session.user: Run `make lint ty` from /home/runner/work/erk/erk and report the complete output including exit codes. Do NOT fix anything.
session.assistant: I'll run the lint and type checking commands from the specified directory.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run make lint and type checking

session.tool_result:
Exit code 2 make: *** [Makefile:13: lint] Error 1
uv run ruff check E501 Line too long (122 > 100) --> tests/fakes/gateway/github.py:964:101 | 962 | result_threads: list[PRReviewThread] = [] 963 | for t in threads: 964 | is_resolved = (t.is_resolved or t.id in self._resolved_thread_ids) and t.id not in self._unresolved_thread_ids | ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ 965 | if is_resolved and not include_resolved: 966 | continue |
Found 1 error.
session.assistant:
The `make lint ty` command failed with exit code 2 (make error).
**Lint Status: FAILED**
- Tool: `ruff check` - Location: `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/fakes/gateway/github.py:964:101` - Issue: Line too long (122 > 100 characters) - Error Code: E501 - Message: Line exceeds the 100 character limit
**Problem Line (964):** ```python is_resolved = (t.is_resolved or t.id in self._resolved_thread_ids) and t.id not in self._unresolved_thread_ids ```
The `ty` (type checking) command did not run because `make lint` failed with exit code 1, which halted the Makefile recipe.
